workout schedule for the week # weekly workout plan day: monday exercises: - warm-up - 10 minutes of light cardio - bodyweight squats - 15 reps - push-ups - 10 reps - bent-over dumbbell rows - 12 reps - high knees - 30 seconds - cool-down - 10 minutes of stretching duration_mins: 40 day: tuesday exercises: - warm-up - 10 minutes of light cardio - 30 minutes of yoga practice - 15 minutes of static stretches duration_mins: 55 day: wednesday exercises: - warm-up - 10 minutes of light cardio - 4 sets of 30 seconds high-intensity exercise followed by 1 minute moderate-intensity exercise - cool-down - 10 minutes of gentle walking and stretching duration_mins: 30 day: thursday exercises: - warm-up - 10 minutes of light cardio - push-ups - 12 reps - dumbbell shoulder press - 10 reps - plank - hold for 30-45 seconds - dumbbell bicep curls - 12 reps - cool-down - 15 minutes of yoga or stretching duration_mins: 45 day: friday exercises: - warm-up - 10 minutes of light cardio - 30 minutes of low-intensity activity - 15 minutes of gentle stretching or foam rolling duration_mins: 55 day: saturday exercises: - warm-up - 10 minutes of light cardio - 20 minutes of mobility exercises or dynamic stretches - cool-down - 10 minutes of stretching duration_mins: 40 day: sunday exercises: - warm-up - 10 minutes of light cardio - bodyweight lunges - 12 reps per leg - romanian deadlifts (with dumbbells) - 10 reps - glute bridges - 15 reps - standing calf raises - 15 reps - cool-down - 20 minutes of gentle yoga or meditation duration_mins: 50 health
